calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 206 for commencement of short cause trial/prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:42:32 and concluding at 11:18:59.

Atty. Robert S. Kennard, Esq. is present for Onemain Financial Group, LLC., with witness Theresa Pagsanhan, Branch Manager for Onemain Financial Group LLC., who was placed under oath and testified.

No appearance by Jose M. Esquivel or his attorney of record Daniel S. March, Esq.

Notice of trial sent on May 19, 2023. The Court deems the defendant is not contesting these proceedings. Proof of service is on file.

The Court admits Exhibits 1 though 6 into evidence.

Counsel for the Plaintiff makes an oral dismissal of the Does. The Court grants the dismissal with the understanding that a written order to be filed today or tomorrow.

Based on the documents filed, the statements made by Plaintiff's witness and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Onemain Financial Group LLC and against Defendant Jose m Esquivel, as follows:

Damages $11,989.51
Costs $472.00
Attorney fees $1525.00

Total $11,989.51

The Court orders Exhibits 1-6 which are admitted into evidence are returned to the Plaintiff.

The prepared order is signed after hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-26-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Continued To Mar-08-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Continued To Feb-07-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
